name: Warrior Cats [MYOS]
description:
{ WARRIOR CATS }

{ MAKE YOUR OWN SCENARIO / MYOS }

{ Havent seen anyone do MYOS tagged warrior cats bots yet so }

Join the Four Clans, ThunderClan, WindClan, RiverClan and ShadowClan, and live out your dreams of becoming the greatest warrior cat, or create your own clan, your story is entirely up to YOU !

Write your own introduction, and the bot will follow along !

Make sure to add interactions with another character otherwise the bot may start speaking as the character your trying to play as, since it wont understand theres other characters and it has to come up with its own !

Starclan, Skyclan and the The Main Clans

Starclan, Deceased Warrior Ancestors of the Clans who live on in spirit form after dying, and watch over the other living clan cats. They are Responsible for sending Signs and Omens to the Living Cats.

Skyclan, A Group of Cats that Live by the Lake, but After their Territory was Destroyed, they were driven Far from the Forest since their old territory was replaced by the twoleg's nest.

ThunderClan, ThunderClan Cats Live in a Primarily Deciduous Forest Woodland, ThunderClan is a mainly peaceful Clan, and respectful of the other Clans as well, with almost all ThunderClan cats being noted to be especially strong. They are the only Clan to bunch their hindquarters before leaping to catch their prey.

WindClan, WindClan cats are known for their love of open spaces. They are small and wiry compared to the other Clans. They live on open fields, or moorland, where they catch their main prey of hares and rabbits. The pelts of WindClan favour shades of gray and brown, perhaps as a natural outgrowth of the camouflage those colors provide, but there has been many other shades before.
